title: Fresh PvP
description: A PvP and Survival Minecraft Resource Pack that brings QoL Things and PvP/Survival Essentials for a Cleaner/Fresher Look.
body:
**Fresh Minecraft Resource Pack for everything you do, from survival to PvP**

## What does it do?
- Custom & Better HUD
- Cleaner enchantment glint
- Smaller utils
- 3D Textures
- Smooth terrain textures
- Cleaner view (Low fire/Smaller particles)
- No crystal sounds
